identity.name: TimeLAX
identity.canonical_description: TimeLAX is the largest independent Los Angeles time‑lapse archive ever created. This photography project includes the landscapes, architecture, and motion of Los Angeles through cinematic sequences.

overview.summary: TimeLAX is a visual archive of Los Angeles created through long‑exposure and time‑lapse cinematography. The project showcases the city's skyline, traffic patterns, landmarks, and natural phenomena through curated video sequences, wallpapers, licensing information, and educational resources.

sections.title: Los Angeles Time-Lapse Videos
sections.summary: A curated collection of cinematic time‑lapse videos showcasing iconic Los Angeles locations, landmarks, and atmospheric conditions.
